2605.30014.title: From GPS Points to Travel Patterns: Flexible and Semantic Trajectory Generation with LLMs
2605.30014.paper_summary: Urban trajectories play a crucial role in modeling urban dynamics and supporting various smart city applications. However, privacy concerns restrict access to large-scale and high-quality trajectory datasets. Trajectory generation provides a promising alternative by synthesizing realistic data to mitigate privacy risks. However, existing methods fail to explicitly capture travel patterns and can only generate fixed-length trajectories under a single condition. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{HTP}, which \textbf{H}ierarchically generates \textbf{T}ravel patterns first and then generates GPS \textbf{P}oints by using large language models (LLMs), rather than directly generating GPS points. We first design a trajectory-specific residual quantization variational autoencoder (RQ-VAE) that quantizes micro-level GPS trajectories into compact, macro-level travel pattern tokens in a coarse-to-fine manner. These tokens capture rich segment spatial irregularities, such as point density variations caused by traffic conditions. Then, we extend the LLM vocabulary with travel pattern tokens to align trajectory representations with the LLM input, and apply supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to align the LLM with the trajectory generation task, enabling generation of travel pattern sequences under various conditions. Extensive experiments on two real-world datasets show that HTP outperforms the strongest baseline by an average of 29.78\% in terms of generation quality. Our code is available at https://github.com/slzhou-xy/HTP.
2605.30014.paper_summary_zh: 城市軌跡在建模城市動態和支持各種智慧城市應用中扮演著至關重要的角色。<lb/>然而，隱私問題限制了對大規模和高質量軌跡數據集的訪問。<lb/>軌跡生成通過合成現實數據來減輕隱私風險，提供了一個有前景的替代方案。<lb/>然而，現有方法未能明確捕捉旅行模式，並且只能在單一條件下生成固定長度的軌跡。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了\textbf{HTP}，它首先\textbf{H}ierarchically生成\textbf{T}ravel模式，然後使用大型語言模型（LLMs）生成GPS\textbf{P}oints，而不是直接生成GPS點。<lb/>我們首先設計了一個特定於軌跡的殘差量化變分自編碼器（RQ-VAE），它以粗到細的方式將微觀級別的GPS軌跡量化為緊湊的宏觀級別旅行模式標記。<lb/>這些標記捕捉了豐富的段落空間不規則性，例如由交通狀況引起的點密度變化。<lb/>然後，我們擴展LLM詞彙表，加入旅行模式標記，以使軌跡表示與LLM輸入對齊，並應用監督微調（SFT）來使LLM與軌跡生成任務對齊，從而實現各種條件下旅行模式序列的生成。<lb/>在兩個真實世界數據集上的大量實驗表明，HTP在生成質量方面平均超越最強基線29.78\%。<lb/>我們的代碼可在https://github.com/slzhou-xy/HTP獲得。
2605.30014.author: Silin Zhou et.al.
2605.30014.authors: Silin Zhou, Chenhao Wang, Yuntao Wen, Shuo Shang, Lisi Chen, Panos Kalnis
